name: ICICI Adani One Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹2,00,000 in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 7% rewards on spends across Adani Group ecosystem including airports, Adani Gas, and Adani Ports
2% rewards on utility and bill payments
1% rewards on all other retail purchases

redemptionOptions: Adani One app redemption for flights and services

welcomeBenefits.condition: On card activation and first transaction

additionalBenefits: 7% rewards across entire Adani Group ecosystem
Adani airport lounge access at Adani-managed airports
Integrated with Adani One app for seamless redemption
Fuel surcharge waiver applicable at all fuel stations
pros: Industry-leading 7% rewards at Adani Group businesses
Useful for frequent flyers from Adani-managed airports
Good for Adani Gas and fuel-related spends
cons: Best rewards locked to Adani ecosystem which has limited everyday use
Only 1% on general spends is below average
idealFor: Frequent users of Adani Group services (airports, gas, utilities)
Travellers who often fly from Adani-managed airports
Users who want an ecosystem-specific card with strong niche rewards

faqs.question: Which Adani businesses qualify for the 7% reward rate?
faqs.answer: The 7% reward rate applies to spends across the Adani Group ecosystem, including Adani Airport services (duty-free, F&B, retail), Adani Gas (CNG, PNG), Adani Electricity, and other Adani Group businesses registered on the Adani One platform.

faqs.question: How do I redeem Adani Reward Points?
faqs.answer: Points can be redeemed through the Adani One app for flights, airport services, and other Adani Group offerings. They can also be used for statement credit or gift vouchers, though best value is within the Adani ecosystem.

faqs.question: Is this card good if I don't use Adani services?
faqs.answer: Not particularly. The card offers only 1% on general spends, which is average. The real value comes from the 7% on Adani Group spends. If you rarely use Adani services, a card like the ICICI Amazon Pay would give better everyday returns.

faqs.question: Do I get lounge access at all airports?
faqs.answer: The 4 domestic lounge visits are available through Dreamfolks at most major airports. At Adani-managed airports, you may also have access to Adani-specific lounges. International lounge access is not included.
